goal_text: Retrieve the pallet_jack from its storage location and deliver it to drop-off zone A (dropoff_a at coordinates 0, 0).
The pallet_jack must be transported to the central delivery point. Navigate to the pallet_jack near (-0.28, -9.48), pick it up, and bring it to dropoff_a at (0.0, 0.0).
Lấy pallet_jack từ vị trí lưu trữ (gần tọa độ -0.28, -9.48) và giao đến khu vực dropoff_a (0.0, 0.0). Xác nhận hoàn thành bằng oracle_check.
